challenges.name: Get 5000 points!
challenges.description: Score at least 5000 points in a single playthrough

challenges.name: Cross the Big Bridge!
challenges.description: Cross the big bridge as fast as possible and defeat the mummy boss!

challenges.name: Phantom Bat — No Subweapon!
challenges.description: Defeat the bat boss using whip only — die once and the run is over.

challenges.name: Medusa Boss Fight
challenges.description: Defeat Medusa as fast as possible. Loaded out with 49 hearts, triple-shot holy water — die once and the run is over.

challenges.name: Escape the Fish-People
challenges.description: Simon's down to 1 bar of HP, mermen everywhere, and only one way out — up the stairs. Reach the next floor without dying.

challenges.name: Mummy Boss Fight
challenges.description: Defeat the twin mummies with whip-only. Full HP, no subweapon — pure timing and positioning.

games.name: Mega Man 2
games.description: The Blue Bomber faces eight new Robot Masters and Dr. Wily's fortress

challenges.name: Metal Man Boss Fight
challenges.description: Defeat Metal Man as fast as possible. Loaded out with full HP — die once and the run is over.

challenges.name: Metal Man — Quick Boomerang Only (∞ ammo)
challenges.description: Defeat Metal Man using only Quick Boomerang. The weapon is locked and ammo refills every frame — but Quick deals 1 damage per hit and Metal Man has 28 HP. Pure aim and survival.

challenges.name: Air Man — Low HP Clutch
challenges.description: Mega Man enters the boss room at 50% HP. Take down Air Man without dying. Buster only, no margin for error.

challenges.name: QuickMan Stage fall part 1
challenges.description: Part 1 of the descent. Survive five vertical scrolls of Quick Man's death-laser corridor. Full HP at start, but one careless drop and the lasers send you back to the title screen.

games.name: Donkey Kong
games.description: The arcade classic — climb the girders, dodge the barrels, save Pauline

challenges.name: Get 2000 points!
challenges.description: Score 2000 points before running out of lives. Bonus points from grabbing the hammer and smashing barrels add up fast.
